reason: The system configurations are modularized inside the config folder.
The main codebase routes, helpers, tests, and domain features reside under app.
Authentication module contains token verification and registry workflow endpoints.
Global helpers folder defines custom application errors.
Routes folder groups all route registrations under one location.
Todo module groups together schemas, validations, and controller operations.
User module groups together schemas, hashing hooks, and controllers for user management.
Declares config module to handle env files loading.
Declares express module to configure router and parser setups.
Declares logging module setting console output format rules.
Declares passport settings establishing JWT strategy.
Provides AppError class definition for error raising.
Stores route configurations connecting endpoints to controllers.
Stores user schema details, validator paths, and hooks.
Stores user operations including retrieval lists and profiles.
Stores todo schema details and helper date functions.
Stores secure todo CRUD operations.
Stores entry gate logic for registration and authorization checks.
Registers routing paths directly on the Express app instance.
Configures and initializes Passport token security context middleware.
Constructs custom Error responses in general catch-all error handling middleware.
Instantiates logger wrapper instances to output HTTP operations.
Extracts JWT token information to fetch matching User instances from MongoDB.
Secures selected routing endpoints with JWT authenticate guards.
Binds login API routes.
Binds registration API routes.
Binds validation token checker API routes.
Binds user collection list retrieval API routes.
Binds profile fetching API routes.
Binds updates of user information API routes.
Binds retrieval of secure todo collections API routes.
Binds creation of todo instances API routes.
Binds fetching of single todo matching ID API routes.
Binds deletion of single todo matching ID API routes.
Binds updates of todo attributes API routes.
Routes requests to auth_controller.login function.
Routes requests to auth_controller.register function.
Routes requests to auth_controller.checkAuth function.
Routes requests to user_controller.list function.
Routes requests to user_controller.getById function.
Routes requests to user_controller.update function.
Routes requests to todo_controller.list function.
Routes requests to todo_controller.create function.
Routes requests to todo_controller.getById function.
Routes requests to todo_controller.removeById function.
Routes requests to todo_controller.update function.
Searches for matching emails using the Mongoose model's findOne API.
Issues a JWT access token upon successful password validation.
Raises unauthorized credentials exception errors.
Persists new user schemas using the Mongoose model's create API.
Issues a JWT access token immediately on registration completion.
Raises errors when authentication tokens are missing.
Fetches user details using User.find().
Queries profile records using User.findById().
Alters database user schemas using User.findByIdAndUpdate().
Retrieves todo lists using Todo.find({ _creator: req.user._id }).
Inserts single todo records using Todo.create().
Queries target todo details using Todo.findOne({ _id: id, _creator: req.user._id }).
Removes record using Todo.findOneAndRemove({ _id: id, _creator: req.user._id }).
Updates status/timestamps using Todo.findOneAndUpdate({ _id: id, _creator: req.user._id }).
Mongoose schema instance method to generate user tokens.
Mongoose middleware validation callback executing password hashing.
Persists and queries user structures within Mongo collections.
Persists and queries todo structures within Mongo collections.
Stores reference keys (_creator) mapping to specific User object documents.
